title: Grok hooks runtime (L3)
goal: Soft and Strict project hooks plus auto-update register on Grok via plugin hooks and user auto-update hook file, with dual-vocabulary matchers.

tasks.title: Auto-update runtime layer for Grok
tasks.description: Extend createAutoUpdateRuntimeProvider (or sibling) to stage SessionStart version-check into Grok hook surface when grok is installed, without removing Claude behavior when both ides are selected.
scopeBoundary: do not rewrite project Soft/Strict scripts logic beyond env/tool name dual support if required for this task
acceptance: install with grok adds a Grok auto-update hook registration; uninstall removes only Atomic Skills entries; Claude path still works when claude-code is selected

tasks.title: Plugin hooks Soft and Strict for project
tasks.description: Fill plugin hooks/hooks.json (and setup docs) for SessionStart, PreToolUse (Grok write tools), and optional Stop; update project-setup and hooks README to list Grok as a hook host; dual-vocab in pre-write/stop if they parse tool names.
scopeBoundary: do not implement cross-model bridge or review-code mode flags
acceptance: README matrices include Grok; Soft setup does not require Stop; matchers include search_replace or write; session-start pre-write and stop fixtures pass for dual-vocab

verifier.command: bash tests/hooks/session-start.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/pre-write.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/stop.test.sh

exitGates.description: Auto-update and project hook registration for Grok reverse cleanly in round-trip tests.
Docs and tests list Grok as a hook-capable host with Soft versus Strict semantics.
Fixture-driven Soft and Strict hook dispatch tests pass with dual-vocab matchers.

verifier.command: bash tests/hooks/session-start.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/pre-write.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/stop.test.sh
